name: Toy Agumon (Black)

signature_move.name: Toy Flame
signature_move.description: Fires a mini-missile in the shape of a flame.

description: A Toy Agumon that has been dyed black. It was infected by a computer virus on the Network , and turned into a toy that bullies children. Its Special Move is firing a mini-missile in the shape of a flame ( Toy Flame ).
